'''Kallabow''' (meaning "wild worker" in [[Shyriiwook]]) was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who was the daughter of [[Attichitcuk/Legends|Attichitcuk]], the sister of [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], the wife of [[Mahraccor]], and the mother of [[Lowbacca]] and [[Sirrakuk]]. She had blue eyes and dark-reddish brown fur. She and Mahraccor worked at the [[Computer/Legends|computer]] fabrication plant in [[Thikkiiana City/Legends|Thikkiiana City]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

{{Char-stub}}
